metadata.name: Inquire About a Tax Refund Status

description: A citizen who filed their income taxes wants to check the status of their refund.

nodes.task_description: Identify the citizen using their SSN, filing status, and exact refund amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely identifies the citizen's tax return.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the tax refund in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the refund was approved and is scheduled for direct deposit next week.

nodes.task_description: Provide the status update, including the scheduled payment date, to the citizen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the refund status and date.
